jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Cleartrip
jsonLd.description:
Cleartrip invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of SEO Specialist at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cleartrip:
Cleartrip is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
